content.problemStatement:
You are given two strings SSS and PPP both consisting of lowercase letters of the English alphabet. Find if the string PPP occurs as a substring in the string SSS.

A substring is a contiguous sequence of characters within a string.


Input Format


The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT - the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.




The first line of each test case contains a single string SSS.




The second line of each test case contains a single string PPP.





Output Format

For each test case, print a single line containing one integer. That integer should be 111 if the string PPP occurs as a substring in the string SSS and 000 otherwise.
constraints: the characters in SSS and PPP are lowercase letters of the English alphabet
the sum of ∣S∣|S|∣S∣ over all test cases does not exceed 4⋅1054 \cdot 10^54⋅105
the sum of ∣S∣|S|∣S∣ over all test cases does not exceed 400040004000

sampleTestCases.input:
3
abcabdabe
abc
xxxaaaxax
xaaax
befdsedfg
dedf
sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Example case 1: The first three characters in SSS form a substring that is equal to PPP.
Example case 2: The string PPP occurs as a substring in SSS from position 333 to position 777.
Example case 3: The string PPP does not occur as a substring in SSS.

hidden.input:
3
abcabdabe
abc
xxxaaaxax
xaaax
befdsedfg
dedf
